text:
First, note that US/Eastern and US/Pacific time zones did not have standardized time zones in 1740 (time zones were established in the 19th century).  
But assuming the modern relationship: US/Pacific is 3 hours behind US/Eastern.  
9:00 PM (21:00) minus 3 hours = 18:00 (6:00 PM) on the same date.  

FINAL_ANSWER: May 18, 1740 18:00
